generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values our nation's security, I've been concerned about how over-reliance on foreign tech could leave us vulnerable. Just look at what happened with the power grid last winter - a single supply chain disruption caused chaos. We need to invest in domestic strategic autonomy now, before it's too late. The alternative is playing Russian roulette with our infrastructure. #NationalSecurityFirst #MadeInAmerica
